title: pilostaxis lutea
intro: Pilostaxis lutea is a type of plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in various regions of the world. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pilostaxis lutea include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Pilostaxis lutea can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory conditions and other health issues.
